scripts.build: echo 'Building app app-32...' && sleep 2.0 && echo 'Webpack: compiled successfully' && echo 'app-32 ready!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.dev: echo 'app-32 started on http://localhost:8002' && while true; do sleep 1; echo '[app-32] GET / 200 12ms'; done
scripts.test: echo 'E2E tests for app-32...' && sleep 0.8 && echo '  12 tests passed, 0 failed'
